mapper.select:
SELECT T.TOKEN_ID AS "tokenId", T.JTI AS "jti", T.ISSUER AS "issuer", T.USER_ID AS "userId", U.USER_NAME AS "userName", T.BRANCH_ID AS "branchId", T.CHANNEL_ID AS "channelId", T.AUTH_GROUP_ID AS "authGroupId", T.TOKEN_TYPE AS "tokenType", T.AUDIENCE AS "audience", T.ISSUED_AT AS "issuedAt", T.EXPIRES_AT AS "expiresAt", T.REVOKED_YN AS "revokedYn", T.REVOKED_AT AS "revokedAt", T.REVOKE_REASON AS "revokeReason", T.CLIENT_IP AS "clientIp" FROM TCF_JWT_TOKEN T LEFT JOIN OM_USER U ON T.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
ORDER BY T.ISSUED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT TOKEN_ID AS "tokenId", JTI AS "jti", ISSUER AS "issuer", USER_ID AS "userId", EXPIRES_AT AS "expiresAt", REVOKED_YN AS "revokedYn" FROM TCF_JWT_TOKEN WHERE ISSUER = #{issuer} AND JTI = #{jti}

where.if: AND R.REVOKED_YN = 'N' AND R.ROTATED_YN = 'N' AND R.EXPIRES_AT > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

mapper.select:
SELECT R.REFRESH_TOKEN_ID AS "refreshTokenId", R.USER_ID AS "userId", U.USER_NAME AS "userName", R.TOKEN_HASH AS "tokenHash", R.TOKEN_FAMILY_ID AS "tokenFamilyId", R.ISSUED_AT AS "issuedAt", R.EXPIRES_AT AS "expiresAt", R.LAST_USED_AT AS "lastUsedAt", R.ROTATED_YN AS "rotatedYn", R.REVOKED_YN AS "revokedYn", R.REVOKED_AT AS "revokedAt", R.CLIENT_IP AS "clientIp", R.USER_AGENT AS "userAgent" FROM TCF_REFRESH_TOKEN R LEFT JOIN OM_USER U ON R.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
ORDER BY R.ISSUED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT H.LOG_ID AS "logId", H.USER_ID AS "userId", U.USER_NAME AS "userName", H.LOGIN_RESULT AS "loginResult", H.FAIL_REASON AS "failReason", H.CHANNEL_ID AS "channelId", H.CLIENT_IP AS "clientIp", H.LOGIN_TIME AS "loginTime" FROM TCF_JWT_LOGIN_HISTORY H LEFT JOIN OM_USER U ON H.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
ORDER BY H.LOGIN_TIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT POLICY_ID AS "policyId", ISSUER AS "issuer", AUDIENCE AS "audience", ACCESS_TOKEN_VALID_MINUTES AS "accessTokenValidMinutes", REFRESH_TOKEN_VALID_HOURS AS "refreshTokenValidHours", ALGORITHM AS "algorithm", CLOCK_SKEW_SECONDS AS "clockSkewSeconds", DENYLIST_CHECK_ENABLED AS "denylistCheckEnabled", REFRESH_TOKEN_ROTATION_ENABLED AS "refreshTokenRotationEnabled", UPDATED_AT AS "updatedAt", UPDATED_BY AS "updatedBy" FROM TCF_JWT_SECURITY_POLICY WHERE POLICY_ID = #{policyId}
